text: can install development version PEcAn.PEPRMT r-universe like : can install directly GitHub remotes package like :
code: # Enable repository from pecanproject options(repos = c(   pecanproject = 'https://pecanproject.r-universe.dev',   CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org')) # Download and install PEcAn.PEPRMT in R install.packages('PEcAn.PEPRMT') library(remotes) install_github('pecanproject/pecan',  subdir = "models/peprmt")
